title: 网页截图工具 | Website Screenshot Tool
description: 对指定网页进行截图，支持PNG/JPEG/PDF格式输出，全页面截图，批量处理 | Capture screenshots of webpages with PNG/JPEG/PDF output, full page support, batch processing

urls.title: 网页地址 | URLs
urls.description: 要截图的网页地址列表 | List of webpage URLs to capture

viewportWidth.title: 浏览器宽度 | Viewport Width
viewportWidth.description: 浏览器宽度（像素）| Browser width in pixels (100-3840)

format.title: 输出格式 | Output Format
format.description: 截图输出格式 | Screenshot output format

fullPage.title: 全页面截图 | Full Page
fullPage.description: 截取整个页面（非仅视口区域）| Capture entire page (not just viewport)

scrollToBottom.title: 滚动到底部 | Scroll to Bottom
scrollToBottom.description: 截图前滚动到页面底部 | Scroll to page bottom before capture

delayAfterScrolling.title: 滚动后等待 | Delay After Scroll
delayAfterScrolling.description: 滚动后等待时间（毫秒）| Wait time after scrolling (ms)

waitUntil.title: 页面加载条件 | Wait Until
waitUntil.description: 何时认为页面加载完成 | When to consider page navigation complete

delay.title: 截图前等待 | Delay Before Capture
delay.description: 截图前额外等待时间（毫秒）| Additional wait time before capture (ms)

timeout.title: 加载超时 | Page Timeout
timeout.description: 页面加载超时时间（秒）| Page load timeout (seconds)

selectorsToHide.title: 隐藏元素 | Elements to Hide
selectorsToHide.description: 截图前隐藏的CSS选择器（如广告、弹窗）| CSS selectors to hide before capture (e.g., ads, popups)

waitForSelector.title: 等待元素 | Wait for Element
waitForSelector.description: 等待指定元素出现后再截图 | Wait for this selector before capture

blockAds.title: 拦截广告 | Block Ads
blockAds.description: 自动拦截广告和追踪脚本 | Auto-block ads and tracking scripts

debugMode.title: 调试模式 | Debug Mode
debugMode.description: 启用详细日志输出 | Enable detailed debug logging
